/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/app.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/app.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/ResourceManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/__/external/glad/src/glad.c.o -o app  ../external/glad/libglad.a ../external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
